joined_dataset.joining_query: SELECT cf.cell_id, cf.patient, cf.type as cell_type, cf.Venetoclax, cf.Azacitidine, cf.`MK-2206`, cf.SAR405838, cf.Molibresib, cf.`MK-8776`, cf.Seliciclib, cf.`BX-912`, cf.Navitoclax, cf.Sorafenib, cf.Midostaurin, cf.Dasatinib, cf.Gilteritinib, cf.Idasanutlin, cf.AML_blast_score, cf.Monocyte_score, cf.Tcell_score, cf.NKcell_score, cf.Bcell_score, dr.drug, dr.drug_response FROM cell_features cf LEFT JOIN drug_response_long dr ON cf.patient = dr.patient_id
